holdings.infoBox: FPAG is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are Analog Devices stock at 4.76%, Alphabet at 4.60%, Citigroup at 3.74%, International Flavors & Fragrances at 3.52%, and Vanguard 0-3 Month Treasury Bill ETF at 3.31%.

overview.description: The FPA Global Equity ETF (FPAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects global large- and mid-cap stocks offered at a substantial discount relative to their intrinsic value and have a favorable outlook for growth. FPAG was launched on Dec 17, 2021 and is issued by FPA.
